{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4845634861506629183
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for gRPC detection and :path extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.grpc import GrpcHandler, _parse_grpc_message_sizes, _parse_grpc_path\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_grpc_path_parse():\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"/package.Service/Method\") == (\"package.Service\", \"Method\")\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"/grpc.health.v1.Health/Check\") == (\"grpc.health.v1.Health\", \"Check\")\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"/\") == (None, None)\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_path(\"\") == (None, None)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_grpc_message_sizes():\r\n    \"\"\"gRPC framing: 1 byte compressed + 4 byte length (big-endian) + payload.\"\"\"\r\n    import struct\r\n\r\n    # One message length 3\r\n    data = bytes([0]) + struct.pack(\">I\", 3) + b\"abc\"\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data) == [3]\r\n    # Two messages\r\n    data += bytes([0]) + struct.pack(\">I\", 2) + b\"xy\"\r\n    assert _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data) == [3, 2]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_grpc_detect_requires_http2():\r\n    h = GrpcHandler()\r\n    # Plain HTTP/1.1 is not gRPC\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\", b\"\") is False\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "7471c21a826f55292ffe6171801891942cf7ce6ebc3cb418de7c9c86941d13c1",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for HTTP/2 stream extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE, HTTP2Handler\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http2_detect():\r\n    h = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    assert h.detect(HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE + b\"\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x04\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x00\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\", b\"\") is False\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http2_parse_minimal():\r\n    \"\"\"Minimal HTTP/2: preface + SETTINGS + HEADERS request + HEADERS response (synthetic).\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import hpack\r\n        from hyperframe.frame import Frame, HeadersFrame\r\n\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        req_headers = encoder.encode(\r\n            [\r\n                (\":method\", \"GET\"),\r\n                (\":path\", \"/\"),\r\n                (\":scheme\", \"https\"),\r\n                (\":authority\", \"example.com\"),\r\n            ]\r\n        )\r\n        # Build minimal c2s: preface + SETTINGS(0) + HEADERS(stream 1)\r\n        settings = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        L = len(req_headers)\r\n        hdr_frame = bytes([L >> 16 & 0xFF, L >> 8 & 0xFF, L & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + req_headers\r\n        c2s = HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE + settings + hdr_frame\r\n        # Server: HEADERS stream 1 :status 200\r\n        enc2 = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        resp_headers = enc2.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        L2 = len(resp_headers)\r\n        s2c = bytes([L2 >> 16 & 0xFF, L2 >> 8 & 0xFF, L2 & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + resp_headers\r\n        h = HTTP2Handler()\r\n        txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n        assert len(txns) >= 1\r\n        t = txns[0]\r\n        assert t.stream_id == 1\r\n        assert t.flow_id == \"flow1\"\r\n        assert t.txn_id == compute_txn_id_http2(\"flow1\", 1)\r\n        assert t.method == \"GET\"\r\n        assert t.path == \"/\"\r\n        assert t.status_code == 200\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        pytest.skip(\"h2/hpack/hyperframe required\")\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "9e0bf166c161f3e8d6e4b232bd869e6d684d1c88644dc8b09c188544275d806b",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Integration test: run netprof analyze on fixtures and assert outputs.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nimport subprocess\r\nimport sys\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_netprof_fixtures_generate(out_dir: Path) -> None:\r\n    subprocess.run(\r\n        [\r\n            sys.executable,\r\n            \"-m\",\r\n            \"netprof.cli.main\",\r\n            \"fixtures\",\r\n            \"generate\",\r\n            \"--output\",\r\n            str(out_dir),\r\n        ],\r\n        check=True,\r\n        capture_output=True,\r\n        cwd=Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_netprof_analyze(pcap_path: Path, out_dir: Path) -> None:\r\n    subprocess.run(\r\n        [\r\n            sys.executable,\r\n            \"-m\",\r\n            \"netprof.cli.main\",\r\n            \"analyze\",\r\n            str(pcap_path),\r\n            \"--out\",\r\n            str(out_dir),\r\n        ],\r\n        check=True,\r\n        capture_output=True,\r\n        cwd=Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED(\r\n    not Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.joinpath(\"netprof\").exists(),\r\n    reason=\"netprof package not installed\",\r\n)\r\ndef test_analyze_fixtures_integration(tmp_path: Path):\r\n    \"\"\"Generate fixtures, run analyze, assert summary and transactions counts.\"\"\"\r\n    fixtures_dir = tmp_path / \"fixtures\"\r\n    out_dir = tmp_path / \"out\"\r\n    _run_netprof_fixtures_generate(fixtures_dir)\r\n    http1_pcap = fixtures_dir / \"http1_keepalive.pcap\"\r\n    http2_pcap = fixtures_dir / \"http2_minimal.pcap\"\r\n    assert http1_pcap.exists(), \"http1_keepalive.pcap should exist\"\r\n    assert http2_pcap.exists(), \"http2_minimal.pcap should exist\"\r\n    _run_netprof_analyze(fixtures_dir, out_dir)\r\n    summary_path = out_dir / \"summary.json\"\r\n    assert summary_path.exists(), f\"summary.json not found in {out_dir}\"\r\n    with open(summary_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as REDACTED        summary = json.load(f)\r\n    assert summary[\"total_flows\"] == 2, (\r\n        f\"expected 2 flows, got {summary['total_flows']}; summary={summary}\"\r\n    )\r\n    assert summary[\"total_transactions\"] >= 2, (\r\n        f\"expected >=2 transactions, got {summary['total_transactions']}\"\r\n    )\r\n    txns_path = out_dir / \"transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    assert txns_path.exists()\r\n    lines = [ln for ln in open(txns_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") if ln.strip()]\r\n    assert len(lines) >= 2\r\n    txn1 = json.loads(lines[0])\r\n    assert \"txn_id\" in txn1\r\n    assert \"flow_id\" in txn1\r\n    assert \"path\" in txn1 or \"method\" in txn1\r\n    flows_path = out_dir / \"flows.jsonl\"\r\n    assert flows_path.exists()\r\n    flow_lines = [ln for ln in open(flows_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") if ln.strip()]\r\n    assert len(flow_lines) == 2\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "ffcbec7afbd7f7d3e5685e04ed4c45535c1681b4a0783d3aa98fd23212cf545a",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"

    },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Pytest configuration and shared fixtures.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\ndef fixtures_dir(tmp_path: Path) -> Path:\r\n    \"\"\"Return a temporary directory; tests that need generated fixtures call fixtures generate first.\"\"\"\r\n    return tmp_path\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\ndef sample_flow_tuple():\r\n    \"\"\"Canonical 5-tuple for flow keying tests.\"\"\"\r\n    return (\"192.168.1.100\", 45000, \"192.168.1.1\", 80)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "8887917e5c320847b61a5a8a646055906469ac3e3e97ae44b6e04a1e293a5359",

%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253AI64%2522%253A4845634861506629183%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25226%253AVARINT%2522%253A4%252C%25227%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%255C%255CAer_J1EHDqJlae-H4TQ%255C%255CyGx6g7ZVgpK3i5A8iWT04fh4.MO9Sj9b9qRD9MQ%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Unit%2Btests%2Bfor%2BgRPC%2Bdetection%2Band%2B%253Apath%2Bextraction.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bnetprof.protocols.grpc%2Bimport%2BGrpcHandler%252C%2B_parse_grpc_message_sizes%252C%2B_parse_grpc_path%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_grpc_path_parse%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B_parse_grpc_path%2528%255C%2522%252Fpackage.Service%252FMethod%255C%2522%2529%2B%3D%253D%2B%2528%255C%2522package.Service%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522Method%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B_parse_grpc_path%2528%255C%2522%252Fgrpc.health.v1.Health%252FCheck%255C%2522%2529%2B%253D%253D%2B%2528%255C%2522grpc.health.v1.Health%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522Check%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B_parse_grpc_path%2528%255C%2522%252F%255C%2522%2529%2B%253D%253D%2B%2528None%252C%2BNone%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B_parse_grpc_path%2528%255C%2522%255C%2522%2529%2B%253D%253D%2B%2528None%252C%2BNone%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_grpc_message_sizes%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522gRPC%2Bframing%253A%2B1%2Bbyte%2Bcompressed%2B%2B%2B4%2Bbyte%2Blength%2B%2528big-endian%2529%2B%2B%2Bpayload.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bimport%2Bstruct%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BOne%2Bmessage%2Blength%2B3%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdata%2B%253D%2Bbytes%2528%255B0%255D%2529%2B%2B%2Bstruct.pack%2528%255C%2522%255Cu003eI%255C%2522%252C%2B3%2529%2B%2B%2Bb%255C%2522abc%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B_parse_grpc_message_sizes%2528data%2529%2B%253D%253D%2B%255B3%255D%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BTwo%2Bmessages%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdata%2B%2B%253D%2Bbytes%2528%255B0%255D%2529%2B%2B%2Bstruct.pack%2528%255C%2522%255Cu003eI%255C%2522%252C%2B2%2529%2B%2B%2Bb%255C%2522xy%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2B_parse_grpc_message_sizes%2528data%2529%2B%253D%253D%2B%255B3%252C%2B2%255D%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_grpc_detect_requires_http2%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bh%2B%253D%2BGrpcHandler%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BPlain%2BHTTP%252F1.1%2Bis%2Bnot%2BgRPC%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bh.detect%2528b%255C%2522GET%2B%252F%2BHTTP%252F1.1%255C%255Cr%255C%255Cn%255C%2522%252C%2Bb%255C%2522%255C%2522%2529%2Bis%2BFalse%255Cr%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%25227471c21a826f55292ffe6171801891942cf7ce6ebc3cb418de7c9c86941d13c1%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%255C%255CAer_J1EHDqJlae-H4TQ%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Unit%2Btests%2Bfor%2BHTTP%252F2%2Bstream%2Bextraction.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bpytest%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bnetprof.correlation%2Bimport%2Bcompute_txn_id_http2%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bnetprof.protocols.http2%2Bimport%2BHTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE%252C%2BHTTP2Handler%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_http2_detect%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bh%2B%253D%2BHTTP2Handler%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bh.detect%2528HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE%2B%2B%2Bb%255C%2522%255C%255Cx00%255C%255Cx00%255C%255Cx00%255C%255Cx04%255C%255Cx00%255C%255Cx00%255C%255Cx00%255C%255Cx00%255C%255Cx00%255C%2522%252C%2Bb%255C%2522%255C%2522%2529%2Bis%2BTrue%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bh.detect%2528b%255C%2522GET%2B%252F%2BHTTP%252F1.1%255C%255Cr%255C%255Cn%255C%2522%252C%2Bb%255C%2522%255C%2522%2529%2Bis%2BFalse%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_http2_parse_minimal%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Minimal%2BHTTP%252F2%253A%2Bpreface%2B%2B%2BSETTINGS%2B%2B%2BHEADERS%2Brequest%2B%2B%2BHEADERS%2Bresponse%2B%2528synthetic%2529.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btry%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bimport%2Bhpack%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bfrom%2Bhyperframe.frame%2Bimport%2BFrame%252C%2BHeadersFrame%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bencoder%2B%253D%2Bhpack.Encoder%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Breq_headers%2B%253D%2Bencoder.encode%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2528%255C%2522%253Amethod%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522GET%255C%2522%2529%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2528%255C%2522%253Apath%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522%252F%255C%2522%2529%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2528%255C%2522%253Ascheme%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522https%255C%2522%2529%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2528%255C%2522%253Aauthority%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522example.com%255C%2522%2529%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255D%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BBuild%2Bminimal%2Bc2s%253A%2Bpreface%2B%2B%2BSETTINGS%25280%2529%2B%2B%2BHEADERS%2528stream%2B1%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsettings%2B%253D%2Bbytes%2528%255B0%252C%2B0%252C%2B0%252C%2B4%252C%2B0%252C%2B0%252C%2B0%252C%2B0%252C%2B0%255D%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2BL%2B%253D%2Blen%2528req_headers%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bhdr_frame%2B%253D%2Bbytes%2528%255BL%2B%255Cu003e%255Cu003e%2B16%2B%255Cu0026%2B0xFF%252C%2BL%2B%255Cu003e%255Cu003e%2B8%2B%255Cu0026%2B0xFF%252C%2BL%2B%255Cu0026%2B0xFF%252C%2B1%252C%2B5%252C%2B0%252C%2B0%252C%2B0%252C%2B1%255D%2529%2B%2B%2Breq_headers%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bc2s%2B%253D%2BHTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE%2B%2B%2Bsettings%2B%2B%2Bhdr_frame%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BServer%253A%2BHEADERS%2Bstream%2B1%2B%253Astatus%2B200%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Benc2%2B%253D%2Bhpack.Encoder%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bresp_headers%2B%253D%2Benc2.encode%2528%255B%2528%255C%2522%253Astatus%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522200%255C%2522%2529%255D%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2BL2%2B%253D%2Blen%2528resp_headers%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bs2c%2B%253D%2Bbytes%2528%255BL2%2B%255Cu003e%255Cu003e%2B16%2B%255Cu0026%2B0xFF%252C%2BL2%2B%255Cu003e%255Cu003e%2B8%2B%255Cu0026%2B0xFF%252C%2BL2%2B%255Cu0026%2B0xFF%252C%2B1%252C%2B4%252C%2B0%252C%2B0%252C%2B0%252C%2B1%255D%2529%2B%2B%2Bresp_headers%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bh%2B%253D%2BHTTP2Handler%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Btxns%2B%253D%2Bh.parse%2528c2s%252C%2Bs2c%252C%2B%255C%2522flow1%255C%2522%252C%2B%255B%25280%252C%2B1000.0%2529%255D%252C%2B%255B%25280%252C%2B1000.02%2529%255D%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Blen%2528txns%2529%2B%255Cu003e%253D%2B1%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bt%2B%253D%2Btxns%255B0%255D%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bt.stream_id%2B%253D%253D%2B1%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bt.flow_id%2B%253D%253D%2B%255C%2522flow1%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bt.txn_id%2B%253D%253D%2Bcompute_txn_id_http2%2528%255C%2522flow1%255C%2522%252C%2B1%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bt.method%2B%253D%253D%2B%255C%2522GET%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bt.path%2B%253D%253D%2B%255C%2522%252F%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bt.status_code%2B%253D%253D%2B200%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bexcept%2BImportError%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpytest.skip%2528%255C%2522h2%252Fhpack%252Fhyperframe%2Brequired%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%25229e0bf166c161f3e8d6e4b232bd869e6d684d1c88644dc8b09c188544275d806b%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%255C%255CAer_J1EHDqJlae-H4TQ%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Integration%2Btest%253A%2Brun%2Bnetprof%2Banalyze%2Bon%2Bfixtures%2Band%2Bassert%2Boutputs.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bjson%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bsubprocess%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bsys%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bpathlib%2Bimport%2BPath%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bpytest%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2B_run_netprof_fixtures_generate%2528out_dir%253A%2BPath%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsubprocess.run%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsys.executable%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522-m%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522netprof.cli.main%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522fixtures%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522generate%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522--output%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bstr%2528out_dir%2529%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255D%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcheck%253DTrue%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcapture_output%253DTrue%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcwd%253DPath%2528__file__%2529.resolve%2528%2529.parent.parent%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2B_run_netprof_analyze%2528pcap_path%253A%2BPath%252C%2Bout_dir%253A%2BPath%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsubprocess.run%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsys.executable%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522-m%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522netprof.cli.main%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522analyze%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bstr%2528pcap_path%2529%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522--out%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bstr%2528out_dir%2529%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255D%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcheck%253DTrue%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcapture_output%253DTrue%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcwd%253DPath%2528__file__%2529.resolve%2528%2529.parent.parent%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255CREDACTED%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bnot%2BPath%2528__file__%2529.resolve%2528%2529.parent.parent.joinpath%2528%255C%2522netprof%255C%2522%2529.exists%2528%2529%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breason%253D%255C%2522netprof%2Bpackage%2Bnot%2Binstalled%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2529%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_analyze_fixtures_integration%2528tmp_path%253A%2BPath%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Generate%2Bfixtures%252C%2Brun%2Banalyze%252C%2Bassert%2Bsummary%2Band%2Btransactions%2Bcounts.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%253D%2Btmp_path%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522fixtures%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bout_dir%2B%253D%2Btmp_path%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522out%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B_run_netprof_fixtures_generate%2528fixtures_dir%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhttp1_pcap%2B%253D%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522http1_keepalive.pcap%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhttp2_pcap%2B%253D%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522http2_minimal.pcap%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bhttp1_pcap.exists%2528%2529%252C%2B%255C%2522http1_keepalive.pcap%2Bshould%2Bexist%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bhttp2_pcap.exists%2528%2529%252C%2B%255C%2522http2_minimal.pcap%2Bshould%2Bexist%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B_run_netprof_analyze%2528fixtures_dir%252C%2Bout_dir%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsummary_path%2B%253D%2Bout_dir%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522summary.json%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary_path.exists%2528%2529%252C%2Bf%255C%2522summary.json%2Bnot%2Bfound%2Bin%2B%257Bout_dir%257D%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bwith%2Bopen%2528summary_path%252C%2Bencoding%253D%255C%2522utf-8%255C%2522%2529%2Bas%2BREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsummary%2B%253D%2Bjson.load%2528f%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary%255B%255C%2522total_flows%255C%2522%255D%2B%253D%253D%2B2%252C%2B%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bf%255C%2522expected%2B2%2Bflows%252C%2Bgot%2B%257Bsummary%255B%2527total_flows%2527%255D%257D%253B%2Bsummary%253D%257Bsummary%257D%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary%255B%255C%2522total_transactions%255C%2522%255D%2B%255Cu003e%253D%2B2%252C%2B%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bf%255C%2522expected%2B%255Cu003e%253D2%2Btransactions%252C%2Bgot%2B%257Bsummary%255B%2527total_transactions%2527%255D%257D%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btxns_path%2B%253D%2Bout_dir%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522transactions.jsonl%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Btxns_path.exists%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Blines%2B%253D%2B%255Bln%2Bfor%2Bln%2Bin%2Bopen%2528txns_path%252C%2Bencoding%253D%255C%2522utf-8%255C%2522%2529%2Bif%2Bln.strip%2528%2529%255D%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Blen%2528lines%2529%2B%255Cu003e%253D%2B2%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btxn1%2B%253D%2Bjson.loads%2528lines%255B0%255D%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2
